key_items: SpaceX IPO with $1.45B Bitcoin treasury expands institutional BTC adoption
Michael Saylor calls $60K Bitcoin floor with 30% expected returns, bipartisan Strategic Bitcoin Reserve bill introduced
Mark Cuban Bitcoin sale and analyst warning on support break create near-term volatility but offset by institutional inflows
reasoning: Multiple institutional catalysts (SpaceX IPO, Blockchain.com IPO filing, strategic reserve legislation, major corporate treasuries) provide strong medium-term support for Bitcoin, while high-profile bearish signals (Cuban's exit, 14-year support break, DeFi security concerns) create tactical sell pressure. The 1-7 day swing window likely experiences consolidation with upside bias as institutional positioning unfolds.
risks: Bitcoin breaking below $50K support level if SpaceX IPO underperforms or broader tech sell-off materializes, combined with institutional capitulation and DeFi contagion concerns.
